dir="ltr"><strong><br /></strong></p><p dir="ltr">We are seeking an experienced<strong> Multi-jurisdiction accounting professional </strong>to oversee accounting operations and financial reporting for a portfolio of client entities while managing a small accounting team. The successful candidate will be responsible for ensuring accurate financial reporting, regulatory compliance and efficient workflow allocation.</p><p dir="ltr"><br /></p><h4 dir="ltr">Accounting Oversight &amp; Team Management</h4><ul><li dir="ltr"><p dir="ltr">Manage and supervise a small team of accounting professionals, including allocation and review of work assignments</p></li><li dir="ltr"><p dir="ltr">Preparation of financial statements for client entities</p></li><li dir="ltr"><p dir="ltr">Ensure accounting entries, allocations, and supporting documentation are accurate and properly maintained</p></li><li dir="ltr"><p dir="ltr">Maintain organised accounting records and documentation for audit and regulatory review</p></li></ul><p><br /></p><h4 dir="ltr">Financial Reporting &amp; Experience</strong></p><ul><li dir="ltr"><p dir="ltr">Proven experience in an accounting or finance management role, preferably within a professional services or multi-entity environment</p></li><li dir="ltr"><p dir="ltr">Minimum 5 years of combined accounting, bookkeeping, and financial reporting experience, including supervision or review responsibilities</p></li><li dir="ltr"><p dir="ltr">Demonstrated experience preparing and reviewing financial statements and coordinating tax reporting obligations</p></li><li dir="ltr"><p dir="ltr">Experience managing accounting matters involving multi-jurisdictional or cross-border corporate structures</p></li><li dir="ltr"><p dir="ltr">Strong organisational, prioritisation, and team coordination skills, with the ability to allocate and review work effectively</p></li><li dir="ltr"><p dir="ltr">Experience in a client-facing finance or accounting role, managing multiple stakeholders and deadlines</p></li><li dir="ltr"><p dir="ltr">Thorough knowledge of accounting principles, financial reporting standards, and accounting procedures</p></li><li dir="ltr"><p dir="ltr">Practical experience with general ledger management and month-end and year-end close processes</p></li><li dir="ltr"><p dir="ltr">Advanced proficiency in spreadsheet modelling and financial systems</p></li><li dir="ltr"><p dir="ltr">Strong working knowledge and administrative experience with accounting software (e.g. Xero or similar platforms)</p></li></ul><p dir="ltr"><strong>Â </strong></p><p dir="ltr"><strong>Working Environment &amp;
